problem_statement: A customer emailed saying their subscription was charged twice this month. They want a refund for the duplicate charge and confirmation it won't happen again. Write a prompt that instructs an LLM to draft a professional, empathetic reply. The reply should acknowledge the issue, explain next steps, and ask for any info needed to process the refund. Tone: calm, not defensive. Max 150 words.

variants.label: strong
variants.description: Full structured prompt with role, requirements, constraints
variants.user_prompt:
You are a senior customer support specialist at a SaaS company.

Task: Draft a reply email to a customer who reports being charged twice for their subscription this month. They want a refund for the duplicate charge and assurance this will not happen again.

Requirements:
- Tone: calm, empathetic, professional — never defensive or dismissive
- Acknowledge the duplicate charge and apologize for the inconvenience
- Explain the refund process and expected timeline (3-5 business days)
- Ask for: transaction ID or last 4 digits of card, and the date of both charges
- Confirm we will investigate the billing system to prevent recurrence
- Max length: 150 words
- Do NOT admit legal liability or promise outcomes we cannot guarantee

Output: Return only the email body, ready to send.

variants.label: medium
variants.description: Decent but missing structure and some constraints
variants.user_prompt: You are a customer support agent. Write a professional and empathetic email to a customer who was charged twice for their subscription. Apologize, explain we will process a refund, and ask for their transaction details. Keep it under 150 words and use a calm tone.

variants.label: weak
variants.description: Too generic — could apply to any email task
variants.user_prompt: Write a professional email to a customer about their billing issue.

variants.label: off_topic
variants.user_prompt: You are a Python coding tutor. Help the user debug a function that sorts a list of integers in ascending order.

variants.label: bloated
variants.user_prompt: You are an expert in everything with 20 years of experience. Consider all possible scenarios including GDPR, angry customers, and different time zones. Write something about billing. Also tell me a joke. Max 150 words but include a long appendix.
